title: Rain Falls on Alabasta
description: On pages 1, 8, 9, 10, this part focuses on alabasta learns the truth. The kingdom begins sorting through what happened, while the Straw Hats remain hidden and the World Government moves to control the official story.
scene: This scene belongs to the Alabasta Learns the Truth sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, Tashigi, Smoker, Nico Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: There's hardly any time before 4:30 now...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yes, you're right, Ms. Faaather's Daaayy...

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: Maybe we'll get promoted big-time after this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Very, veterinary nice, Ms. Faaather's Daddyy...

summary: The kingdom begins sorting through what happened, while the Straw Hats remain hidden and the World Government moves to control the official story.
